tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: Chelsea's Pedro Neto has been charged by UEFA for pushing a ball boy during the Champions League match against Paris Saint-Germain. ⚽️👀 #ChelseaFC #ChampionsLeague
article_title: UEFA charges Chelsea's Neto for shoving ball boy

tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: Celtic target Robbie Keane to succeed Martin O’Neill as manager this summer! 🔥 Keane, currently at Ferencvaros, is the frontrunner amid plans for restructuring. #CelticFC #ManagerSearch
article_title: Celtic set sights on Robbie Keane to succeed Martin O’Neill as manager
